title: Nong Teng Nakleng-pukaotong
original_title: โหน่ง เท่ง นักเลงภูเขาทอง
overview: In 1920s Siam, Bunteng, a member of a likay performing troupe, is faced with the prospect of his art dying when he and his family are threatened with eviction by a businessman who hopes to build a movie theater on the site of their stage.
